app.name: Usta
app.tagline: A master mechanic in your pocket

camera.stepTitle: Find the dipstick and check the level
camera.safetyStrip: Warning: The engine may be hot. Park on firm ground; if jacked up, support it with axle stands.

camera.offline: You are offline — waiting for connection
camera.hint: Center the part in the frame and tap Check
